name: Achim Imboden
working_identity: Cross-Pollinator between People, Tech and Governance

core_summary.short: You are a rare bridge-builder who combines change management, AI curiosity, governance awareness, technical intuition, and strong human sensing. You operate best where others only see silos: leadership vs workforce, governance vs innovation, technology vs people, vision vs execution.
core_summary.one_sentence: You turn emerging technology into something humans can actually understand, trust, adopt, and use.

who_you_are.inner_drive: You do not just want employment. You want stimulation, movement, relevance, and growth.

how_you_work.decision_style: You often feel the right direction before you can fully explain it, then build structure afterward.

natural_strengths: Can use AI as thought amplifier
Uses dialogue instead of one-shot prompting
Combines strategy + creativity + practical use cases
Uses LLMs as sparring partners, designers, coders, editors, and mirrors

your_pattern.phase_1: Open exploration, many ideas, broad context
your_pattern.phase_3: Convert into framework / JSON / prototype / landing page / narrative

advanced_behaviour: Using one model for coding, another for strategy
risk_with_llms: Using AI stimulation as substitute for focused execution
how_you_work_with_llms.highest_use_case_for_you: LLMs help externalize your mind fast enough that others can finally see what you already sense.

professional_signature.hidden_value: You often create strategic clarity before organizations realize they need it.
professional_signature.market_position: Many people can implement tools. Fewer can make people adopt them. Even fewer can do both strategically.

your_edge.why_people_notice_you: You bring energy, language, concepts, and movement into spaces that are often dry or confused.

main_risks: Waiting for others to recognize potential
Too many starts, not enough closures
best_countermoves: Choose one flagship problem to own

sometimes: More strategic than your title suggests

truth_about_you.statement: Your challenge is likely not capability. It is translation and positioning in systems that reward simpler labels.
truth_about_you.second_statement: You are not built for static lanes. You are built for frontier zones.

best_next_identity.recommended_line: I help organizations turn AI potential into real workforce capability through governance-aware adoption, practical systems design, and human-centered transformation.

final_assessment.plain_english: You are a modern organizational navigator. Part strategist, part translator, part builder, part catalyst. When correctly placed, you compound fast.
